purpose: Pin the harness binary subcommand that exposes frankenlibc_membrane::runtime_math::evidence::validate_runtime_evidence_row_v1 as a standalone CLI. The lib API validates a single parsed runtime_evidence JSONL row against the v1 fail-closed contract: 18 required top-level fields (schema, schema_version, timestamp, trace_id, bead_id, event, mode, runtime_mode, validation_profile, decision_path, healing_action, denied, latency_ns, api_family, symbol, context, source_commit, artifact_refs), plus exact-string match for schema/event, enum match for mode/runtime_mode (strict|hardened) and validation_profile (Fast|Full), bool/u64 type checks, non-empty string checks, and structural validation of context (must contain addr_hint_redacted, requested_bytes, is_write, contention_hint, bloom_negative) and artifact_refs (non-empty array of non-empty strings). Previously reachable only from Rust callers; the CLI bridge lets CI fail-closed gate evidence JSONL artifacts.

jsonl_output_contract.record_count: N+1 (one per input row plus one summary)
